Apple Scab Leaf.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply appropriate fungicide.
Apple Scab Leaf.prevention: Maintain proper airflow and avoid wet leaves.

Apple leaf.treatment: No treatment required. Continue normal care.

Apple rust leaf.treatment: Apply rust-control fungicide and remove infected parts.
Apple rust leaf.prevention: Avoid excess moisture and maintain field hygiene.

Bell_pepper leaf.treatment: No treatment required. Monitor plant growth.

Bell_pepper leaf spot.treatment: Remove affected leaves and apply copper-based fungicide.
Bell_pepper leaf spot.prevention: Avoid overhead irrigation and maintain spacing.

Cherry leaf.prevention: Maintain good soil and watering practices.

Corn Gray leaf spot.treatment: Apply recommended fungicide and remove infected debris.

Corn leaf blight.treatment: Use fungicide treatment and remove infected leaves.

Corn rust leaf.treatment: Apply suitable fungicide if infection spreads.

Potato leaf early blight.treatment: Apply fungicide and remove damaged leaves.

Potato leaf late blight.prevention: Use certified seeds and proper drainage.

Tomato Early blight leaf.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicide.
Tomato Early blight leaf.prevention: Avoid leaf wetness and maintain spacing.

Tomato Septoria leaf spot.treatment: Apply fungicide and remove infected foliage.

Tomato leaf bacterial spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves and use copper-based sprays.

Tomato leaf late blight.treatment: Apply fungicide immediately and remove infected plants.
Tomato leaf late blight.prevention: Improve ventilation and avoid excess humidity.

Tomato leaf mosaic virus.treatment: Remove infected plants and control insect vectors.

Tomato leaf yellow virus.treatment: Control whiteflies and remove infected plants.

grape leaf black rot.treatment: Remove infected grapes/leaves and apply fungicide.
